hero.trustBar: Partner to incubators, consulting firms and training centers in Cameroon
hero.title: Boost the performance and profitability of your training
hero.subtitle: ThinkTech Solutions designs and deploys Moodle-based e-learning platforms in Cameroon and Central Africa, built to be smooth and secure. Give your learners an intuitive experience on every device, so they can train without limits, anywhere and fully on their own.

platforms.name: Bouka Creativ' Learning

platforms.name: ThinkTech Academy
platforms.description: Our own LMS dedicated to digital skills learning. ThinkTech Academy offers certified online pathways in key fields: management, tax, audit, accounting and artificial intelligence.

platforms.description: In collaboration with the École Supérieure Technique LaSalle in Douala, we are leading a progressive digital transformation: dematerialization of continuous assessments, online academic tracking, and structured learning pathways.

platforms.name: Owendo Mineral Port
platforms.description: For the Owendo Mineral Port in Gabon, we designed a complete QHSE induction program on Moodle: awareness videos, timed quizzes, gamified progress bar and real-time leaderboard to engage every employee and contractor.

about.title: Who we are
about.intro: Founded in 2024 in Douala, ThinkTech Solutions was born from a simple conviction: training quality is one of the most powerful levers to build a better nation. Our team of 5 experts now supports universities, companies, NGOs and training centers across Cameroon and Central Africa in building high-performing, secure e-learning platforms adapted to real-world conditions.
about.intro2: Driven by its founder Ignace MBOM ELOUGA, ThinkTech Solutions puts accessibility and human support at the heart of every digital transformation project.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Make training accessible to everyone, everywhere.

visionMid.title: Mid-term vision
visionMid.text: Help young Africans embrace digital learning.

visionLong.title: Long-term vision
visionLong.text: Train a generation skilled and equipped for today's challenges.

values.title: Innovation
values.text: We constantly explore new ways to make training more engaging and effective.

values.title: Closeness
values.text: We stay attentive to each organization, with human support at every step.

values.title: Security
values.text: Your data and your learners' data are protected to the highest standards.

values.title: Excellence
values.text: We aim for quality in every deployment, every line of code, every interaction.

services.title: Our Moodle expertise, at your service
services.subtitle: From design to daily support, we handle the entire lifecycle of your training platform.

cards.title: Moodle platform deployment
cards.benefit: An operational platform quickly, configured to your needs.

cards.title: Visual and functional customization
cards.benefit: A platform that reflects your brand.

cards.title: Third-party system integration
cards.benefit: A platform connected to your existing tools.

cards.title: Admin and trainer training
cards.benefit: A self-sufficient team in the long run.

services.whySubtitle: Many organizations in Central Africa know Moodle exists. The challenge is configuring it properly, making it scale, and adapting it to your learners. That's exactly what we do.

why.title: Moodle without the headaches
why.text: Misconfigured roles, disorganized courses, an interface that puts learners off — that's the reality of most poorly set-up platforms. We deliver a solution ready to train from day one, not a project you have to finish yourself.

why.title: Built for real-world conditions
why.text: Unstable connections, entry-level smartphones, learners in semi-urban areas: our platforms are optimized for these constraints from the ground up, not patched after launch.

why.title: Your brand, not a recognizable template
why.text: No more generic Moodle that everyone recognizes. Every deployment carries your colors, your logo, and your identity. Your learners log into your platform, not just "another Moodle".

why.title: Protected data, controlled access
why.text: Your learners trust you with their personal data. We put the right protections in place: HTTPS, daily backups, fine-grained role-based permissions, and regular security updates.

why.title: A direct contact, not a ticket queue
why.text: No outsourced support, no form that disappears into a void. When something breaks, you have a direct contact who knows your setup and responds the same day.

why.title: End-to-end, without leaving you alone
why.text: Installation, configuration, training your admins and instructors, post-launch follow-up: we don't vanish at delivery. Your long-term success is part of the deal.

process.title: Needs analysis
process.text: We discuss your goals and constraints with you.

process.title: Deployment
process.text: We configure and launch your platform.

process.title: Training
process.text: We train your administrators and trainers.

process.title: Ongoing support
process.text: We stay available for support and updates.

contact.title: Ready to transform your training?
contact.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. Based in Douala, we support organizations across Cameroon and Central Africa: in under 30 minutes, we'll show you how a well-designed Moodle platform can transform your training management, with no commitment.

form.name: Full name
form.needPlaceholder: Describe your project: estimated number of learners, type of training, desired timeline...
form.consent: I agree that my personal data (name, email, phone, organization) may be processed by ThinkTech Solutions solely to respond to my demo request.
form.success: ✅ Thank you! Your request has been received. Our team will contact you within 24-48 business hours. Meanwhile, check our FAQ or email us at contact@thinktech-solutions.com.
form.error: An error occurred while sending. Please try again or email us directly at contact@thinktech-solutions.com.

items.q: How long does it take to deploy a Moodle platform?
items.a: Usually between 2 and 6 weeks, depending on your project's complexity and the level of customization you need. We always start with a needs analysis so we can give you a precise timeline before committing to anything.

items.q: How much does a custom Moodle platform cost?
items.a: Pricing depends on the number of learners targeted, the features you need, and the level of support involved. Rather than fixed packages, we put together a quote tailored to your situation after a free, no-commitment first conversation.

items.q: Does the platform work well on a limited internet connection?
items.a: Yes, that's one of our strengths: every platform is built mobile-first and optimized for low data consumption, designed for real connectivity conditions across Africa, including rural areas.

items.q: Can you integrate our existing tools (payment, HR, video conferencing)?
items.a: Yes. We connect your platform to your existing tools through APIs or custom integrations, so you avoid duplicate data entry and keep your internal processes running smoothly.

items.q: Do you train our teams to use the platform?
items.a: Always. Every deployment includes guided onboarding for your administrators and trainers, along with clear documentation, so your team is self-sufficient from day one.

items.q: What happens after launch? Do you offer ongoing support?
items.a: Yes, our support doesn't stop at launch. We stay available for technical support, security updates, and future improvements to your platform.

items.q: How do you guarantee the security of our data and our learners'?
items.a: Monitored hosting, HTTPS certificate, regular and tested backups, and strict role and access management: security is built into every platform from the start, not bolted on afterward.

realisations.title: Platforms that actually train people
realisations.subtitle: Each project is concrete proof of our approach: understand the context, deliver a solution that scales, and stay present after launch.
realisations.ctaTitle: Your project will be our next case study

projects.name: Bouka Creativ' Learning
projects.description: In partnership with the Boukarou incubator, we designed and deployed an e-learning platform to support the upskilling of 42,000 young people across all 10 regions of Cameroon. The project addresses a dual challenge: making training accessible on smartphones in rural areas, and structuring a content catalogue suited to learners new to digital tools.
projects.challenge: Build a platform accessible in rural and semi-urban areas, optimized for entry-level smartphones, and able to handle thousands of simultaneous registrations without excluding low-bandwidth territories.
projects.solution: Lightweight Moodle architecture, compressed media, streamlined UX designed for a first e-learning experience, and load testing before launch to guarantee stability at scale.

projects.name: ThinkTech Academy
projects.description: ThinkTech Academy is ThinkTech Solutions' proprietary LMS, built to develop digital skills. The platform covers 5 key domains — management, tax, audit, accounting and artificial intelligence — with certified pathways, fine-grained access management and an interface designed for the African learner.
projects.challenge: Build a proprietary LMS capable of structuring and certifying digital skills learning, adapted to the African market, with a smooth and engaging learner experience.
projects.solution: Modular learning pathways with locked progression, integrated certification system, learner and trainer dashboards, responsive interface fully customised to ThinkTech's brand identity.

projects.name: Erfolg Zentrum Online
projects.description: For this training centre based in Germany, we delivered a fully turnkey Moodle platform: complete configuration, ready-to-use course spaces, remote admin training and documentation handed over at delivery. The platform was live and fully operational the day after launch — with no on-site intervention required.
projects.challenge: Deliver a complete, operational solution for an international client thousands of kilometres away, meeting high quality standards with fully remote support.
projects.solution: Phased deployment methodology, training sessions via video call, comprehensive technical and pedagogical documentation delivered at handover, and post-launch support included.

projects.name: EST LaSalle Douala
projects.description: In collaboration with EST LaSalle in Douala, we are driving a progressive digital transformation of the institution. Phase 1 focuses on the dematerialization of continuous assessments: lecturers create and publish their evaluations online, students complete them from any device, and results are automatically centralised.
projects.challenge: Guide a higher education institution through digital transition without disrupting the academic calendar, while progressively engaging a teaching staff unfamiliar with e-learning tools.
projects.solution: Phased rollout starting with continuous assessments on a custom Moodle LMS, practical training workshops for lecturers, responsive support, and a validated expansion roadmap agreed with management.

projects.name: Owendo Mineral Port
projects.description: For the Owendo Mineral Port in Gabon, we designed a complete QHSE induction program on Moodle: awareness videos, timed quizzes, a gamified progress bar and real-time leaderboard to actively engage every employee and external contractor.
projects.challenge: Rapidly and effectively train hundreds of employees and contractors on the QHSE requirements of an industrial port site, with result tracking and active learner engagement.
projects.solution: Moodle course structured in 3 sections (access & behavior, PPE, hazard reporting), with Powtoon videos, timed quizzes, a points system and live leaderboard.

realisations.ctaSub: Every project starts with a conversation. Tell us what you want to build.

approachSteps.title: Understand
approachSteps.text: We take time to analyse your context, your learners and your technical constraints before writing a single line of code.

approachSteps.title: Build
approachSteps.text: Deployment, configuration, visual identity, demo content — we deliver a ready-to-use platform, not a bare skeleton.

approachSteps.title: Support
approachSteps.text: Admin training, documentation, post-launch support. We stay present long after go-live.

realisations.heroSub: Every project delivered is a platform that runs, learners who grow, and a client who trusts us for what comes next.

footer.tagline: Based in Douala, we design and deploy Moodle e-learning platforms for universities, companies and NGOs across Cameroon and Central Africa.
